author: y4rr
content: Restored ops/higher_order.rs from git and made it the canonical cond/scan implementation. Applied the backward correctness fix in-place: CondBackward now holds a single 'branch_output' field (was operands+predicate+output_index+branch_outputs Vec), ScanBackward holds a single 'target' field (was carries+xs+outputs Vec + OutputKind enum). Dropped the now-vestigial CondBranch and OutputKind enums — the held tensor encodes the role. Wired into the public API via lib.rs/autograd::mod.rs (autograd::{cond, scan, validate_cond_branches} now re-exports from crate::ops::higher_order). Deleted autograd/cond_scan.rs (640 lines). Ported 4 gradient-value tests adapted to the tensor-predicate API. Total ops::higher_order tests now 24 (20 from the original file + 4 ported gradient-value tests). Public API is now PyTorch-style: cond takes &Tensor<T> (scalar > 0.5 = true) instead of bool. Gates: fmt clean, clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, 1257 unit + 26 integration tests pass, whole-workspace check clean.
